files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "tetragon-288-e2e-framework-implement-metricschecker",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "tetragon: e2e-framework: implement metricschecker",
+    "description": "e2e-framework: implement metricschecker. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current tetragon deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your tetragon version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n tetragon -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tetragon\nhelm list -n tetragon 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working tetragon installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review tetragon configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant tetragon configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n tetragon -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tetragon\nkubectl get configmap -n tetragon -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=tetragon\n```\nWe already have an rpcchecker package to verify Tetragon events from our gRPC API. The next item on my wishlist is a metricschecker we could use to verify specific prometheus metrics during end-to-end tests."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for e2e-framework: implement metricschecker",
+        "description": "### Description\n\nImplement a metricschecker for e2e tests.\nIt uses http GET calls to retrieve metrics from all tetragon pods. Note that i keep it simple and:\n* did not leverage existing `multiplexer` package since it seems built around grpc connections and didn't want to add a whole new implementation. Also, since we are just using `http.Get`s it is really not needed imho.\n* it is intended to be used as a last step in the test (before uninstalling the deployment) to check that desired metric\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n tetragon -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tetragon\nkubectl get events -n tetragon --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"e2e-framework: implement metricschecker\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### Description\n\nImplement a metricschecker for e2e tests.\nIt uses http GET calls to retrieve metrics from all tetragon pods. Note that i keep it simple and:\n* did not leverage existing `multiplexer` package since it seems built around grpc connections and didn't want to add a whole new implementation. Also, since we are just using `http.Get`s it is really not needed imho.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
